ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country where the city is located */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the city (population per square kilometer) */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the city */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_continent_id FOREIGN KEY ("continent_id") REFERENCES continents ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the continent where the country is located */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "capital_city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_capital_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("capital_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continents" (
  "continent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continent */,
  "continent_name" TEXT /* Name of the continent */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the continent in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the continent */,
  "major_languages" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of major languages spoken in the continent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("continent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city for the given year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the population data is recorded */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution data */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution data */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution data */,
  "economic_data" TEXT /* Economic data (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_data" (
  "geographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic data record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance from a reference point */,
  "max_distance" REAL /* Maximum distance from a reference point */,
  "std_distance" REAL /* Standard deviation of distance from a reference point */,
  "elevation_data" TEXT /* Elevation data (e.g., average, minimum, maximum) */,
  "climate_data" TEXT /* Climate data (e.g., average temperature, precipitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geographic_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shapefiles" (
  "shapefile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shapefile record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "shapefile_path" TEXT /* Path to the shapefile */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the shapefile (e.g., .shp, .geojson) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the shapefile was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the shapefile in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shapefile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shapefiles_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
